description: No test covers the full save integration pipeline: editor_update_note_body → trigger_idle_save/trigger_blur_save → verify isDirty transitions to false. REQ-004 requires that after a successful save via REQ-007, 'isDirty = false'. REQ-007 requires that 'After a successful save, update the in-memory map: store the saved body as last-saved body, set isDirty = false.' None of the existing tests exercise this cross-command flow. The tests in note_body_editor_handlers.rs manually update the store after simulated saves (e.g., lines 65-70: 'entry.is_dirty = false; entry.last_saved_body = body.clone();'), which does not verify the actual integration between the two commands through the Tauri layer.
expected: Add an integration test that: (1) calls editor_update_note_body with a body, (2) verifies isDirty=true in the store, (3) calls trigger_idle_save or trigger_blur_save with the same noteId and body, (4) verifies isDirty=false in the store and last_saved_body matches. Also add a test that verifies isDirty stays true when save fails. Both tests should exercise the actual command functions or the Tauri IPC test harness.
